summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Maestro EGP Iteration 6 features. All features working correctly: 1) Super Admin dashboard shows tenants list with stats (total tenants, active tenants, total users, total sales). 2) Super Admin tenant management - view details, toggle status via PUT endpoint. 3) Reset sales button in Super Admin dashboard opens confirmation dialog with warning. 4) Cash register summary API returns correct sales breakdown (total_sales, cash_sales, card_sales, credit_sales, driver_sales, etc.). 5) Cash register close dialog shows denomination counting for Iraqi currency.
passed_tests: Backend: Super Admin login authentication (200 OK)
Backend: Super Admin login with wrong secret key (403 Forbidden)
Backend: Super Admin login with wrong password (401 Unauthorized)
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/tenants - returns list of tenants with stats
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/stats - returns dashboard stats (total_tenants, active_tenants, total_users, total_sales)
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/tenants/{id} - returns tenant details with users, branches, stats
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/live-stats - returns live stats for tenant
Backend: POST /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/reset-sales - requires confirmation (400 without confirm)
Backend: POST /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/reset-sales - endpoint exists and validates
Backend: GET /api/cash-register/summary - returns correct sales breakdown
Backend: Cash register summary includes total_sales, cash_sales, card_sales, credit_sales, driver_sales
Backend: PUT /api/super-admin/tenants/{id} - toggle tenant status works
Backend: System Admin login authentication (200 OK)
Frontend: Super Admin login page loads with email, password, secret key fields
Frontend: Super Admin dashboard shows stats cards (total tenants, active tenants, users, sales)
Frontend: Super Admin dashboard shows subscription stats (trial, basic, premium)
Frontend: Super Admin dashboard shows tenants list with action buttons
Frontend: Reset sales button (RotateCcw icon) visible in tenant row
Frontend: Reset sales confirmation dialog opens with warning message
Frontend: Reset sales dialog shows tenant name and irreversible action warning
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with quick actions and today's stats
Frontend: Cash register close button visible in dashboard header
Frontend: Cash register close dialog shows sales summary (total, cash, expenses, expected)
Frontend: Cash register close dialog shows Iraqi currency denominations (250-50000)
Frontend: Cash register close dialog has confirm button
critical_code_review_comments: Super Admin dashboard properly displays tenants with stats and action buttons
Reset sales feature implemented with proper confirmation dialog and warning
Cash register summary API correctly filters by tenant_id and shift_id
Cash register close dialog shows all required fields including denomination counting
Toggle tenant status uses PUT endpoint with is_active field (not separate toggle endpoint)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Iteration 6 features tested and working: 1) Super Admin dashboard at /super-admin shows tenants list with stats (total tenants: 1, active: 1, users: 7, sales: 538,000 د.ع). Dashboard includes subscription breakdown (trial/basic/premium). 2) Tenant management includes view details, toggle status (via PUT /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}), reset password, impersonate, live view, and delete. 3) Reset sales button (orange RotateCcw icon) opens confirmation dialog with warning about deleting orders/shifts. API endpoint: POST /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/reset-sales?confirm=true. 4) Cash register summary API (/api/cash-register/summary) returns complete sales breakdown including total_sales, cash_sales, card_sales, credit_sales, driver_sales, delivery_app_sales, discounts_total, cancelled_orders, expenses, net_profit, expected_cash. 5) Cash register close dialog shows denomination counting for Iraqi currency (250, 500, 1000, 5000, 10000, 25000, 50000).
